candidate_answers.text: Perfect, thanks. I’ll pull up order W2378156 so I can verify the items in it and see what exchange options we can support.
The user has now supplied the missing order identifier, so the next grounded move is to retrieve that order rather than jumping ahead to product matching or exchange execution.
